CustomField.description: The scheduled transport date for picking up (returning) this equipment from the site. When populated, the trip engine creates or consolidates a Pickup Trip (Direction__c = "Pickup") grouping all line items sharing the same departure agency and date. This is a transport return date, not a billing date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the date when this equipment must be picked up (returned) from the site. A pickup trip will be automatically created or updated. Leave blank if no return transport is needed for this line item.
CustomField.label: Pickup Date
